patterns.command_pattern: Commands are defined as enum variants in main.rs Command enum, implemented as cmd_* functions in cards.rs or dedicated modules
patterns.card_movement: Use fs::rename() for atomic state transitions, write meta before rename, render thumbnail after
patterns.process_management: PIDs stored in xattr sh.bop.agent-pid, use kill -0 to check liveness, SIGTERM for graceful stop, SIGKILL for force
patterns.meta_updates: Use bop_core::read_meta() and bop_core::write_meta(), update fields before fs::rename()

existing_implementations.description: cmd_retry moves cards from any state to pending/, cmd_kill stops running processes via SIGTERM, dispatcher already handles exit code 75 for rate-limiting

critical_requirements.pause_race_condition: Must check card still in running/ immediately before rename to avoid double-move with concurrent dispatcher
critical_requirements.exit_75_handling: Pause must NOT move cards that voluntarily exit with code 75 - dispatcher owns those
critical_requirements.transient_patterns: Use const TRANSIENT_PATTERNS slice, check both failure_reason and stderr last line
critical_requirements.stderr_reading: Read last non-empty line from logs/stderr, truncate to 256 bytes for failure_reason
